name: Prompt Observer
description: Structured prompt, context, and tool observability for production debugging.

mode.label: Capture Mode
mode.help: summary logs counts and metadata, while full additionally logs prompt text and detailed tool/context payloads.

includeSystemPrompt.label: Include System Prompt
includeSystemPrompt.help: When unset, follows mode (enabled in full mode).

includePrompt.label: Include User Prompt
includePrompt.help: When unset, follows mode (enabled in full mode).

includeHistoryMessages.label: Include History Messages
includeHistoryMessages.help: When unset, follows mode (enabled in full mode).

includeLlmOutput.label: Include LLM Output
includeLlmOutput.help: Adds assistant output and usage events to the observer stream.

includeToolResults.label: Include Tool Results
includeToolResults.help: When unset, follows mode (enabled in full mode).

includeBootstrapFiles.label: Include Bootstrap Files
includeBootstrapFiles.help: Logs explicit bootstrap file selection via agent:bootstrap when internal hooks are enabled.

redactSensitive.label: Redact Sensitive Strings
redactSensitive.help: Masks common token/secret patterns before writing observer payloads to logs.

maxCharsPerField.label: Max Characters Per Field
maxCharsPerField.help: Truncates large prompt, message, and tool-result fields to this size before logging.

maxHistoryMessages.label: Max History Messages
maxHistoryMessages.help: Limits how many recent history messages are included when detailed history capture is enabled.

toolNames.label: Observed Tool Names
toolNames.help: Tool calls to log. Defaults to memory_search, memory_get, web_search, and web_fetch.
